channel.title: mycatalog updates
channel.description: 'My Catalog' uses the IBM Cloud catalog API to retrieve data from the catalog. It attempts to be as accurate as possible. This feed shows additions, updates, removals from the catalog. Use with care. It is a work-in-progress :)

item.title: [removed] Enterprise Application Service (enterprise-app-java)
item.description: IBM Enterprise Application Service for Java is an application platform for building, deploying, and running enterprise Java applications in the cloud.

item.title: [updated] Key Protect (kms) has a new plan named dedicated
item.description:
A dedicated key management solution designed to provide enterprises with full control over their encryption keys and cryptographic operations in the cloud.
This plan does not offer cross-regional resiliency.
